10.name: 渡辺 曜&鬼塚夏美&大沢瑠璃乃

abilities.raw_text:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: REDUCE_COST(1) {PER_CARD="HAND", FILTER="NOT_SELF"} -> SELF

10.ability_text:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: REDUCE_COST(1) {PER_CARD="HAND", FILTER="NOT_SELF"} -> SELF

TRIGGER: CONSTANT
EFFECT: PREVENT_BATON_TOUCH(SELF)

TRIGGER: ON_LIVE_START
COST: SELECT_HAND(VARIABLE) {FILTER="NAME_IN=['渡辺 曜', '鬼塚 夏美', '大沢 瑠璃乃']"} (Optional) -> DISCARD_COUNT
EFFECT: CONDITION: VALUE_GT(DISCARD_COUNT, 0); ADD_BLADES(1, PER_CARD=DISCARD_COUNT) -> SELF {DURATION="UNTIL_LIVE_END"}
10.original_text:
{{jyouji.png|常時}}手札にあるこのメンバーカードのコストは、このカード以外の自分の手札1枚につき、1少なくなる。
{{jyouji.png|常時}}このメンバーはバトンタッチで控え室に置けない。
{{live_start.png|ライブ開始時}}手札の「渡辺曜」と「鬼塚夏美」と「大沢瑠璃乃」を、好きな枚数控え室に置いてもよい：ライブ終了時まで、これによって控え室に置いた枚数1枚につき、{{icon_blade.png|ブレード}}を得る。
（手札のこのカードもこの効果で控え室に置ける。）
10.original_text_en:
[Continuous] The Cost of this member card in your hand is reduced by 1 for each other card in your hand.
[Continuous] This member cannot be put into the waiting room by Baton Touch.
[Live Start] You may put any number of 'You Watanabe', 'Natsumi Onitsuka', and 'Rurino Osawa' cards from your hand into the waiting room: This member gets +1 Blade for each card put into the waiting room by this effect until the end of the live phase.
(This card in your hand can also be put into the waiting room by this effect.)

188.name: 日野下花帆

abilities.raw_text:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) -> SUCCESS
EFFECT: CONDITION: VALUE_EQ(SUCCESS, TRUE); SELECT_RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, SCORE_LE=3"} -> CARD_HAND

188.ability_text:
TRIGGER: ACTIVATED (Once per turn)
COST: PAY_ENERGY(2) -> SUCCESS
EFFECT: CONDITION: VALUE_EQ(SUCCESS, TRUE); SELECT_RECOVER_LIVE(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=4, SCORE_LE=3"} -> CARD_HAND
188.original_text: {{kidou.png|起動}}{{turn1.png|ターン1回}}{{icon_energy.png|E}}{{icon_energy.png|E}}：自分の控え室からスコア3以下の『蓮ノ空』のライブカードを1枚手札に加える。
188.original_text_en: [Activate] [Once per Turn] (E)(E): Add 1 'Hasunosora' Live card with score 3 or less from your waiting room to your hand.

4284.original_text_en: [Activate] [Once per Turn] (E)(E): Add 1 'Hasunosora' Live card with score 3 or less from your waiting room to your hand.

415.name: 高海千歌

abilities.raw_text:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
CONDITION: COUNT_SUCCESS_LIVE(PLAYER) == 0, COUNT_SUCCESS_LIVE(OPPONENT) >= 1
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(3) -> SELF

415.ability_text:
TRIGGER: CONSTANT
CONDITION: COUNT_SUCCESS_LIVE(PLAYER) == 0, COUNT_SUCCESS_LIVE(OPPONENT) >= 1
EFFECT: ADD_BLADES(3) -> SELF
415.original_text: {{jyouji.png|常時}}自分の成功ライブカード置き場のカードが0枚で、かつ相手の成功ライブカード置き場にカードが1枚以上ある場合、{{icon_blade.png|ブレード}}{{icon_blade.png|ブレード}}{{icon_blade.png|ブレード}}を得る。
415.original_text_en: [Always] If you have 0 cards in your score pile and your opponent has 1 or more cards in their score pile, you gain (Blade)(Blade)(Blade).

527.name: 澁谷かのん

abilities.raw_text:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: SELECT_MEMBER(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=3"} (Optional) -> TARGET; NEGATE_EFFECT(TARGET, TRIGGER="ON_LIVE_START") -> SUCCESS
CONDITION: VALUE_EQ(SUCCESS, TRUE); SELECT_RECOVER_MEMBER(1) {ZONE="DISCARD", FILTER="GROUP_ID=3"} -> CARD_HAND

527.ability_text:
TRIGGER: ON_PLAY
EFFECT: SELECT_MEMBER(1) {FILTER="GROUP_ID=3"} (Optional) -> TARGET; NEGATE_EFFECT(TARGET, TRIGGER="ON_LIVE_START") -> SUCCESS; CONDITION: VALUE_EQ(SUCCESS, TRUE); SELECT_RECOVER_MEMBER(1) {ZONE="DISCARD", FILTER="GROUP_ID=3"} -> CARD_HAND
527.original_text: {{toujyou.png|登場}}自分のステージにいる『Liella!』のメンバー1人のすべての{{live_start.png|ライブ開始時}}能力を、ライブ終了時まで、無効にしてもよい。これにより無効にした場合、自分の控え室から『Liella!』のカードを1枚手札に加える。
527.original_text_en: [On Play] You may negate all [Live Start] abilities of 1 'Liella!' member on your stage until the end of the live phase. If you do, add 1 'Liella!' card from your waiting room to your hand.
